changes.task: Create CSV parser with configurable column mapping
changes.description: Created ColumnMapping struct with DateCol, AmountCol, DescriptionCol, DebitCol, CreditCol, DateFormat, SkipRows. ParseCSV reads CSV via io.Reader and returns []ImportRow with date, amount_cents, description. Supports both single-amount (KCB) and split debit/credit (Equity, M-PESA) column formats. 6 table-driven tests covering KCB, Equity, M-PESA formats plus edge cases.

changes.task: Create import preview and commit flow
changes.description: ImportService with PreviewImport (auto-categorizes by keyword matching category names in descriptions) and CommitImport (creates transactions via TransactionService, skips duplicates by date+amount+description match). Returns ImportSummary with TotalImported, SkippedDuplicates, TotalAmountCents. 3 tests: preview with category matching, commit flow, duplicate skipping.

Added GraphQL types: ColumnMappingInput/Output, ImportPreviewRow, ImportSummary, ImportRowInput, BankPreset. Mutations: previewCSVImport (parse+categorize), commitCSVImport (create transactions). Query: bankPresets returns preset mappings for KCB, Equity, M-PESA. ImportService wired into Resolver and main.go.
